appraisal_events.evidence: « par politesse pour ses amis à qui les professions de foi dreyfusardes de Robert de Saint-Loup étaient pénibles… je demandai à mon voisin »
appraisal_events.explanation: The narrator redirects the conversation away from Robert’s Dreyfusard declarations because they are painful to some friends, signaling that Robert’s line of talk is unwelcome in the group.

status_effects.explanation: Robert’s stance is tactfully sidelined, weakening his immediate influence in the conversation.
